summary: Game Tab | Hearing Announcement When Focusing on an Upcoming Game
description:
GIVEN the user is in the Games tab
AND TTS is enabled
AND the game has not started yet

steps.action: WHEN the user focuses on an upcoming game tile
steps.result:
THEN the user will hear: “Start time <insert start time>, <Away team name> @ <Home Team Name>, X of X items”
For example: "Start time 7:05 PM, Red Sox @ Blue Jays, 3 of 6 items"
